name: Human
traits: Languages: Common and one extra language
description: Versatile and annoyingly everywhere. Humans, the default setting of fantasy.

name: Elf
description: Graceful, long-lived and somehow still dramatic after several centuries.

name: Dwarf
description: Durable, stubborn and built like someone compressed a tank into a person.

name: Halfling
description: Small, lucky and statistically too dangerous for their height.

name: Tiefling
description: Infernal heritage, dramatic silhouette and automatic main-character energy.
